= Spring Cloud Config
:artifactid: camel-spring-cloud-config-starter

Spring Boot auto-configuration for Camel Spring Cloud Config integration.

This starter allows Camel to resolve property placeholders from a https://spring.io/projects/spring-cloud-config[Spring Cloud Config Server]. It hooks into Spring Boot's `Environment` early in the startup lifecycle to fetch remote configuration before Camel routes are initialized.

== Maven coordinates

[source,xml]
----
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.apache.camel.springboot</groupId>
    <artifactId>camel-spring-cloud-config-starter</artifactId>
</dependency>
----
